title: ヴィクトリアマイルにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've cleared away all my doubts! I'm going to
make Sweep eat my dust! ...In the most
sportsmanlike way possible, of course!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even the paddock can't contain me today—I'll
dash out and make a declaration to all of my fans!
I'm going to shine ever brighter!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So I hope all my opponent princesses are ready!
Can you handle my Princess☆Suplex?!
